title: humboltia crassipes
intro: Humboldtia crassipes, also known as the "Coral Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka and India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Humboldtia crassipes include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Humboldtia crassipes can be prepared as a decoction, a tea, or an infusion, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
